## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '....'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Device

- Device: [e.g. Pixel 8, iPhone 15]
- OS: [e.g. Android 14, iOS 17.3]
- App version: [e.g. 1.0.0 — see Settings → About]

## Game context

- Expansion(s) enabled: [Base / Close Encounters / Replicators / All Good Things]
- Turn number:
- Scenario:
- Empire Advantage selected (if any):

## Additional context

Any other context, save file (redacted if needed), or rulebook section reference.
